items.name: mysterious picture 1
items.desc: The picture is stained with black ink.

items.name: mysterious picture 2
items.desc:
The clear picture shows a small child with a blonde hair smiling happily while hugging his orange teddy bear. 
After careful examining it, you see two small wings sticking out from his back.

items.name: mysterious picture 3
items.desc: The picture is stained with black ink.

items.name: mysterious picture 4
items.desc: The picture is stained with black ink.

items.name: king picture
items.desc:
The picture portrays the current ruler of the empire, which is also your father, King Iotate. 
His long gray hair with slanted red eyes symbolizes a bold, descisive, and ambitious person.

items.name: princess picture
items.desc:
A sincere yet insecure smile can be seen from your older sister's portrait. 
Her brown eyes with eyeglasses and her two braided brown hair made you reminisence the time when she has not gone missing.

items.name: duke picture
items.desc:
The picture shows an one-eyed man with tiger fur jacket and cigarette. 
This is your uncle, a carefree person that roams freely without a permanent place to settle. 
You only met him once when you were small.

items.name: prince picture
items.desc:
A portrait of yourself. 
A young man with blonde hair and heterochromatic eyes of red and green.

items.name: black pearl
items.desc:
An omnious looking pearl with green aura from its within. 
This seems the pearl that your father told you to get.

items.name: long sword
items.desc:
A long sword with black gem on its hilt. 
You recall that you usually train with this sword when you were little.

items.name: black key
items.desc:
A mysterious key that you have never seen. 
Maybe it will be useful to unlock a certain room.

items.name: flashlight
items.desc: A small flashlight that still has a lot of battery.

items.name: king dead body
items.desc:
The corpse of the king that is just being killed. 
You can still feel a lukewarm texture on his skin. 
Some tears begin welling up at your eyes before rolling down gracefully on your cheeks.
